entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a legume with significant nutritional and economic value.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand and perform better under drought stress.

entities.name: ASR GENE
entities.description: Abscissic acid and stress ripening gene that plays a key role in regulating plant stresses.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental stress that causes a decline in chickpea productivity.

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of describing the molecular properties and sequence of the ASR gene.

entities.name: NCBI GENBANK
entities.description: The genetic sequence database where the ASR gene sequence was submitted.

entities.name: MUSCLE SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used for the alignment and analysis of ASR nucleotide sequences.

entities.name: ABA/WDS INDUCED PROTEIN MRNA
entities.description: Putative mRNA that shows sequence similarity to the ASR gene.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL SCREENING
entities.description: Method used to demonstrate the expression of the ASR gene under stress.

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: Quantitative reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction used to measure ASR gene expression.

entities.name: CONSERVED DOMAIN SEARCH
entities.description: Analysis used to establish the role of the ASR protein.

entities.name: PROTEIN STRUCTURE ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to establish the role of the ASR protein.

entities.name: NETWORK ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis used to establish the role of the ASR protein.

entities.name: PHYRE2
entities.description: Tool used for protein structure prediction and validation.

entities.name: SWISS-PDB VIEWER
entities.description: Tool used for protein structure analysis.

entities.name: PROSA
entities.description: Tool used for protein structure validation.

entities.name: STRING ANALYSIS
entities.description: Tool used for protein-protein interaction network analysis.

entities.name: ASR PROTEIN NP_001351739.1
entities.description: Hypothetical protein that mediates drought responses.

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTION FACTOR
entities.description: A protein that regulates the transcription of genes to control drought stress tolerance.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL MARKERS
entities.description: Markers developed for the genetic improvement of chickpea.
